data.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: All fixes complete. (1) evals.json: updated resolve-conflicts pattern to include backticks matching actual SKILL.md text. (2) end-session/SKILL.md: added CRITICAL safety guard with 'do NOT use git merge -X ours' for tickets-tracker conflicts. (3) project-setup/SKILL.md: replaced 6 non-portable '/Users/joeoakhart/digital-service-orchestra-worktrees/worktree-20260326-074511/plugins/dso/scripts/' paths with portable '/Users/joeoakhart/digital-service-orchestra/plugins/dso/scripts/'. Results: 55/55 evals pass. test-gh-availability-check: 10/10 pass. test-skill-script-paths: 5/5 pass. test-validate-test-batched-integration: 11/11 pass.
